title: Re Armored
description: This pack replace all armor sets with 3D models
body:
**The resource pack requires EMF to work and CIT-variants for the helmet variants.** This resource pack replaces all armor (except the turtle shell helmet) with 3D versions.
**helmet variants:**
diamond - visor
golden - hryak
netherite - holy
**here's example (my personal favorite):** ![Iron set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84a2d169f9d6106cc06e3ebd17d954f9dc29df45_0.webp)
